findings.adversarial_hypothesis: Partial failure during academic repository writes causes phantom success UI because local cache is mutated before API call succeeds.
verification_sequence_executed: Run test to confirm phantom success
Fix src/repositories.ts to revert cache on error
findings.expected_behavior: If an API call fails during saveTasks, saveTimetableTemplates, saveTaskPlacements, or saveCalendarAudit, the local cache should not retain the failed mutation.
findings.observed_behavior: The local cache was mutated before the API call, and not reverted on failure, causing the UI to show the mutation as successful until the next full reload.
findings.race_condition_assessment: This is a deterministic failure recovery bug, not a race condition.
findings.security_impact: Low security impact, but high data integrity impact.
findings.user_impact: Users believe their changes are saved, but they are lost on reload.
findings.root_cause: Optimistic cache mutation without rollback on API failure.

intent_integrity_block.feature_intent: Academic repository writes should be durable and reflect backend state.
intent_integrity_block.intent_gap: Phantom success UI on network failure.

ux_integrity_block.primary_user_journey: Saving a task or timetable template.

recovery_integrity_block.degrade_behavior: Show error message and revert UI state.
recovery_integrity_block.retry_or_rollback_strategy: Rollback local cache on API failure.
recovery_integrity_block.observability_hook: API error thrown and caught by caller.

findings.fix_recommendation: Wrap API calls in try/catch and revert local cache on error.
closure_criteria: Test passes with empty snapshot on failure

required_test_output.coverage_rule: One-to-one mapping: every open or blocked high/critical finding must have at least one test spec

preconditions: Mock API client to reject saveAcademicTask
steps: Call repositories.tasks.saveTasks with a new task
assertions: Expect repositories.tasks.getTasksSnapshot to not contain the new task
high_critical_test_specs.expected_result: Local cache is reverted on API failure
